parts.text:
Professional product photography of COLORMATIC 1K ΑΣΤΑΡΙ ΓΕΜ/ΚΟ HG2 400ML.. 
    The item is placed on a clean, light-grey polished concrete surface with subtle industrial textures. 
    Background is a softly blurred, minimalist workshop setting with neutral earth tones. 
    Lighting is soft, natural daylight from the side, creating realistic soft shadows. 
    Authentic aesthetic, premium yet practical. Clear focus, 2K resolution.
